---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that the engine does not support today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If it is a new job board, note whether it exposes structured
eligibility data (like Himalayas) or only free text (like RemoteOK), and link its API or feed.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Keeping it profile-driven

This engine hardcodes nothing candidate-specific: preferences come from the profile. If your
request implies a new signal, consider how it would be expressed in the profile schema rather than
baked into the code.
